news.t: SoFi Announces Reverse Stock Split for SoFi Select 500 ETF (SFY)

holdings.infoBox: SFY is an equity ETF with a total of 505 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.04%, Apple at 4.72%, Microsoft at 4.18%, Broadcom at 3.95%, and Micron Technology at 3.29%.

overview.description: The SoFi Select 500 ETF (SFY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive SoFi US 500 Growth index. The fund tracks a multi-factor-weighted index of US large-cap equities selected by market-cap. SFY was launched on Apr 11, 2019 and is issued by SoFi.

data.title: SoFi Announces Reverse Stock Split for SoFi Select 500 ETF (SFY)
data.text: NEW YORK, Sept. 20, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Board of Trustees of Tidal ETF Trust (the “Trust”) has approved a reverse stock split of the issued and outstanding shares of the SoFi Select 500 ETF (...
